request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about resilience. In an era of unpredictable threats, diversifying supply chains and reducing dependencies isn't just smart policy, it's essential for national security. While some claim this weakens alliances, the truth is we're strengthening our collective security by ensuring no single point of failure exists. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
